pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which explicitly set and use this directory.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which use this directory for output grading.
Verified via setup_task.sh which generates exactly 24 image frames dynamically using a Python script.
Matched against the task description requirement and the generated frame count (1 to 24). Grading scripts also specifically sample frames 1 and 12.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 24 dynamically generated, synthetic frames of a bouncing ball saved to /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/bounce_ref. The agent must export the traced result to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/rotoscope_test. The underlying grading logic checks for correct export directories, visibility of the reference background, creation of new project levels, and evidence of traced strokes by structurally comparing rendering outputs on frames 1 and 12.
